tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (copula) linking the subject to the predicate complement.
Cardinal numeral expressing age; modifies the measure noun 'Jahre'.
Common noun in plural used as a measure unit in the age expression.
Predicate adjective complement indicating age.

sentences.target: Mein Bruder ist siebzehn und sehr groß.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n ˈbʁuːdɐ ɪst ˈziːpt͡seːn ʊnt zeːɐ̯ ɡʁoːs/

translations.de: Mein Bruder ist siebzehn und sehr groß.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n ˈbʁuːdɐ ɪst ˈziːpt͡seːn ʊnt zeːɐ̯ ɡʁoːs/
translations.en: My brother is seventeen and very tall.
translations.es: Mi hermano tiene diecisiete años y es muy alto.
translations.fr: Mon frère a dix-sept ans et il est très grand.
translations.it: Mio fratello ha diciassette anni ed è molto alto.
translations.ko: 남동생은 열일곱 살이고 키가 아주 커요.
translations.ru: Моему брату семнадцать, и он очень высокий.
translations.pt: Meu irmão tem dezessete anos e é muito alto.
translations.he: אח שלי בן שבע עשרה והוא מאוד גבוה.
translations.tr: Erkek kardeşim on yedi yaşında ve çok uzun boylu.
translations.vi: Em trai tôi mười bảy tuổi và rất cao.
translations.ar: أخي عمره سبعة عشر عامًا وهو طويل جدًا.
translations.nl: Mijn broer is zeventien en heel lang.
translations.uk: Моєму братові сімнадцять, і він дуже високий.
translations.hu: A fiútestvérem tizenhét éves, és nagyon magas.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई सत्रह साल का है और बहुत लंबा है.
translations.pl: Mój brat ma siedemnaście lat i jest bardzo wysoki.
translations.el: Ο αδελφός μου είναι δεκαεπτά χρονών και είναι πολύ ψηλός.
translations.nb: Broren min er sytten og veldig høy.
translations.id: Saudara laki-laki saya berusia tujuh belas tahun dan sangat tinggi.
translations.sv: Min bror är sjutton och väldigt lång.
translations.ro: Fratele meu are șaptesprezece ani și este foarte înalt.
translations.cs: Můj bratr má sedmnáct let a je velmi vysoký.
translations.da: Min bror er sytten og meget høj.
translations.fi: Veljeni on seitsemäntoista ja hyvin pitkä.
translations.ja: 弟は17歳で、とても背が高いです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Bruder' (nominative masc. sg.).
Common noun; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (copula) introducing the predicate complements.
Cardinal numeral used predicatively to state age.
Coordinating conjunction linking two predicate parts.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective 'groß'.
Predicate adjective describing the subject.

sentences.target: Der Bus kommt um siebzehn Uhr an.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ bʊs kɔmt ʊm ˈziːpt͡seːn uːɐ̯ an/

translations.de: Der Bus kommt um siebzehn Uhr an.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ bʊs kɔmt ʊm ˈziːpt͡seːn uːɐ̯ an/
translations.en: The bus arrives at five p.m.
translations.es: El autobús llega a las cinco de la tarde.
translations.fr: Le bus arrive à dix-sept heures.
translations.it: L'autobus arriva alle cinque del pomeriggio.
translations.pt: O ônibus chega às cinco da tarde.
translations.vi: Xe buýt đến lúc năm giờ chiều.
translations.nl: De bus komt om vijf uur aan.
translations.hi: बस शाम पाँच बजे पहुँचती है.
translations.pl: Autobus przyjeżdża o piątej po południu.
translations.el: Το λεωφορείο φτάνει στις πέντε το απόγευμα.
translations.ro: Autobuzul sosește la ora cinci după-amiaza.
translations.ja: バスは午後5時に来ます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article modifying 'Bus' (nominative masc. sg.).
Common noun; subject of the clause.
Finite part of the separable verb 'ankommen' (3rd sg. pres.); main predicate meaning 'arrives'.
Preposition introducing a time expression ('um siebzehn Uhr').
Cardinal numeral modifying 'Uhr' in the time phrase.
Common noun denoting the time unit; head of the temporal PP.
Separable verb particle associated with 'kommt' to form 'ankommen'; placed clause-final.

sentences.target: Das Zimmer kostet siebzehn Euro pro Nacht.
sentences.reading: /das ˈt͡sɪmɐ ˈkɔstət ˈziːpt͡seːn ˈɔʏ̯ʁo pʁoː naxt/

translations.de: Das Zimmer kostet siebzehn Euro pro Nacht.
translations.ipa: /das ˈt͡sɪmɐ ˈkɔstət ˈziːpt͡seːn ˈɔʏ̯ʁo pʁoː naxt/
translations.en: The room costs seventeen euros per night.
translations.es: La habitación cuesta diecisiete euros por noche.
translations.fr: La chambre coûte dix-sept euros par nuit.
translations.it: La camera costa diciassette euro a notte.
translations.ru: Номер стоит семнадцать евро за ночь.
translations.pt: O quarto custa dezessete euros por noite.
translations.he: החדר עולה שבעה עשר אירו ללילה.
translations.tr: Oda gecelik on yedi avro tutuyor.
translations.vi: Phòng có giá mười bảy euro mỗi đêm.
translations.ar: الغرفة تكلف سبعة عشر يورو لليلة.
translations.nl: De kamer kost zeventien euro per nacht.
translations.uk: Кімната коштує сімнадцять євро за ніч.
translations.hu: A szoba éjszakánként tizenhét euróba kerül.
translations.hi: कमरा प्रति रात सत्रह यूरो का है.
translations.pl: Pokój kosztuje siedemnaście euro za noc.
translations.el: Το δωμάτιο κοστίζει δεκαεπτά ευρώ τη νύχτα.
translations.nb: Rommet koster sytten euro per natt.
translations.id: Kamar harganya tujuh belas euro per malam.
translations.sv: Rummet kostar sjutton euro per natt.
translations.ro: Camera costă șaptesprezece euro pe noapte.
translations.cs: Pokoj stojí sedmnáct eur za noc.
translations.da: Værelset koster sytten euro per nat.
translations.fi: Huone maksaa seitsemäntoista euroa per yö.
translations.ja: 部屋は一泊17ユーロです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article modifying 'Zimmer' (nominative neuter sg.).
Common noun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (3rd sg. pres.) expressing price.
Cardinal numeral modifying the currency noun 'Euro'.
Common noun for currency; direct object specifying the amount.
Preposition introducing a rate ('per night').
Common noun; complement of the preposition 'pro' forming a rate phrase.
